breakdown: This PR hardens validation for stream processing by changing behavior from silently returning empty success to raising RuntimeError on malformed done payloads, and fixes attribute name inconsistencies (llm_request → gemini_request). The test suite now includes comprehensive AST structure validation ensuring narrative fallback logic sits at the correct level. While naming is clear and error handling is improved, documentation is sparse with no docstrings or explanatory comments for the architectural changes.
key_changes: Changed test_process_action_stream_empty_done_payload from asserting empty success to asserting RuntimeError is raised for malformed payloads
Fixed mock attribute name inconsistency: llm_request → gemini_request in two test files
Added test_process_action_preserves_top_level_debug_info_precedence to verify debug_info precedence logic
Added test_process_action_keeps_narrative_fallback_directly_under_structured_guard using AST inspection to verify code structure
Updated ConnectionResetError messages to be more specific ('stream dropped', 'mcp dropped')
